'''Monhudle''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran sectors]] region. During the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Traavis]] led [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone forces]] to war against the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] on this planet.

{{Planet-stub}}
